caption: A group of men dressed in formal suits and traditional Indian attire walk together through an outdoor area with trees and greenery in the background. Several men wear dark business suits with ties, while one man wears a light-colored Nehru jacket. As they move, they are surrounded by others, including individuals who appear to be security personnel. A News18 India logo is visible in the top right corner of each frame, accompanied by the website "news18india.com". At the top, red text asks, "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?". Across the bottom, a red banner reads, "जे. पी. नड्डा: नीतीश का वापस आना सुखद समाचार है", and a smaller yellow label says "MAHAGOSH बातचीत का माहौल" next to a time stamp of "10:01 PM". The scene progresses as the group walks forward, with the camera following them, and a man wearing glasses enters the left foreground.
